testcase.classname: audio aura generation metal demos with high energy produce an intense aura

testcase.classname: audio aura generation same genre demos still get different aura palettes

testcase.classname: audio aura generation metadata analysis does not guess bpm when it is not explicit
testcase.name: audio aura generation metadata analysis does not guess bpm when it is not explicit

testcase.classname: audio aura generation metadata analysis keeps explicit bpm from the filename
testcase.name: audio aura generation metadata analysis keeps explicit bpm from the filename

testcase.classname: trackService filterByGenre returns only matching tracks

testcase.name: app routes public user search omits email addresses

testcase.name: app routes play endpoint increments play count explicitly

testcase.name: app routes register rejects a duplicate username with different casing

testcase.name: app routes rating endpoint rejects the owner's own demo

testcase.name: app routes admin overview rejects a non-admin token
